description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is composed of a mix of dark and light panels, likely a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, giving it a sleek and professional appearance. Large, vertically oriented windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and a small car parked in front, surrounded by a grassy lawn. The structure appears to have two main stories, with a slightly recessed upper floor and a prominent main entrance. The overall look is minimalist and functional, typical of contemporary urban office buildings.
description: A modern, two-story office building with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, set on a grassy plot with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large vertical windows, and a car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's elongated profile, flat roof, and the continuation of the dark and light paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows and the grassy area behind the building, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows and the driveway extending to the back.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large vertical rectangular windows on the front and rear facades, with some asymmetry on the sides.
